did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a perspective study and comprehensive literature review that explores advancements in scalable computing and AI (machine learning, deep learning) for skin cancer detection. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI methods; rather, it synthesizes findings from 65 previously published articles.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
